name: Poppyseed Thumbprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar in a mixer until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg yolk and Grand Marnier. Mix in the flour and salt until well combined.
3. Fold in the poppy seeds and orange peel to blend thoroughly.
4. Form the dough into 1-inch balls and place on ungreased baking sheets.
5. Make a thumbprint in the center of each cookie.
6. Fill the centers with about 1/4 teaspoon of jelly.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 12 minutes.
8. Allow cooling for 5 minutes before transferring to wire racks.
or other orange-flavored liqueur The cookies can be frozen with or without the jelly filling.
